caption_summary: A young Black woman explores an Area 51 hangar, shifting her gaze from a glowing interface to the stars outside a reinforced glass window, captured by a cinematic push-in camera.

panels.description: Young Black woman with short curly hair and round wire-rimmed glasses wearing a mustard-yellow cable-knit sweater and large over-ear headphones stands inside a shadowy industrial hangar, looking downward at a softly glowing interface with a gentle smile, framed in medium close-up with dim, moody lighting.

Same woman slowly lifting her chin and turning her face upward and to the left towards a tall, reinforced glass observation window, her expression shifting to awe, with a cinematic camera performing a slow push-in and upward tilt, blurred industrial server racks in the background enhancing depth.

Close-up of the woman's face illuminated softly by twinkling stars visible through the large glass window; her eyes wide with wonder, reflecting the deep starry sky outside; ambient low-key lighting emphasizing her emotional awe and the futuristic hangar setting.
